summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlaySmart badminton companion app. Backend API fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend features working correctly with successful end-to-end user flows.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warning in console - charts render but throw size warnings
design_issues.details: Charts display correctly but console shows width(-1) height(-1) warnings from Recharts library

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, features grid, and CTA buttons
POST /api/auth/send-otp returns OTP hint for testing
POST /api/auth/verify-otp validates OTP and returns JWT token
Complete OTP authentication flow on frontend works correctly
6-step skill assessment completes and creates user profile
Dashboard displays after profile creation with skill level and stats
GET /api/recommendations/equipment/{user_id} returns top 3 racket recommendations
Equipment page shows recommendation cards with compatibility scores and specs
GET /api/recommendations/training/{user_id} returns 30-day training plan
Training page displays plan with weeks, days, drills, and video links
POST /api/progress marks training days complete/incomplete correctly
Progress page shows completion stats, charts, and 30-day grid
Player card page generates and displays shareable profile card
GET /api/drills returns 60 drills successfully
GET /api/equipment?category=racket returns 25 rackets
All navigation between pages working correctly
Backend authentication and authorization working properly
Equipment recommendation rule engine producing appropriate scores
Training plan data structure with drills and videos integrated correctly
Player card generation with profile data and recommended equipment
Error handling for invalid requests (401, 400, 404) working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor chart warning only
